prestazioni: EP6FDT 1.6L Turbo (THP 207) engine: Full forged internals with Manitou Engineering forged crankshaft (86mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 8.5:1 forged pistons for 28psi boost capability, paired with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with Bell Auto Sport 4-ply silicone couplers and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate

BorgWarner EFR 7670 (0.92 A/R) turbo upgrade with custom DS Motorsport-spec titanium turbine wheel, mated to a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system with a PWR Advanced Cooling 525x225x76mm bar-and-plate intercooler (core volume: 1.8L) and Pierburg CWA 200 high-flow water pump for auxiliary IC cooling

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with custom DS3 Performance-specific fueling map, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0261500040 high-pressure fuel pump (350L/h @ 7bar), ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a custom 3-layer AN-8 fuel rail with -8AN braided lines and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PCV & crankcase ventilation)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS DS3-specific widebody kit (front fenders + rear quarter panels) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) and custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirror caps

Rocket Bunny V3 DS3 rear diffuser with integrated carbon fiber diffuser fins and dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips (custom Akrapović Ti-Evo system), paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter (50mm overhang) and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear wing (1,200mm span, 250mm chord, 15° angle of attack) with integrated Gurney flap

OMP Racing carbon fiber bucket seats (Sparco Pro 2000 shell) with custom DS3-specific mounting brackets, paired with a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point bolt-in) by Custom Cages UK, featuring integrated harness bars and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay with Alcantara-wrapped Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, 12/6 o’clock markers)
